name: Scala, Inc.
summary: Scala, Inc. engages in the SaaS/ASP, sales force automation, field marketing, and customer support businesses in Japan. It also provides CRM/SFA software; offers education and consulting services; and operates an e-commerce site for buying and selling battle game trading cards. In addition, the company offers licenses for sales support systems; and cloud services, customized development, sales consulting, sales skill training, and business process consulting services. The company was formerly known as Fusion Partners Co. and changed its name to Scala, Inc. in December 2016. Scala, Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
